name: Peanut Butter Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine sugar, butter, flour, and milk.
2. Bring the mixture to a full boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
3. Continue boiling for 3 minutes more, still stirring constantly.
4. Remove the saucepan from the heat.
5. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (puffed wheat, peanut butter, chopped walnuts, coconut, vanilla, and salt) to the cooled mixture.
6. Drop teaspoonfuls of the batter onto waxed paper.
7. Allow the drops to cool on the waxed paper.
Makes 60 cookies.
